episodes.title: Oversight committee subpoenas AG Pam Bondi to answer questions on Epstein files
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee voted on Wednesday to subpoena Attorney General Pam Bondi to answer questions over how the Department of Justice handled files related to Jeffrey Epstein. Five Republicans voted with Democrats to approve the subpoena, which was proposed by Rep. Nancy Mace, R-S.C. Mace forced the voting during a hearing that was unrelated to Epstein.

“The American people want answers on the Epstein files, and so do we,” Mace said in a post on X.


      #montana #montanamoment #nbcmontana #mtwx #news

FULL STORY:  https://nbcmontana.com/news/nation-world/oversight-committee-subpoenas-ag-pam-bondi-to-answer-questions-on-epstein-files-lawmakers-department-justice

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton questioned for about six hours on Epstein; leaked photo pauses deposition
episodes.description:
Hillary Clinton testified before House Oversight Committee members on Thursday, as they continue their probe into Jeffrey Epstein.

After roughly six hours of questioning, the former Secretary of State shared with the press what she told lawmakers: that she has no new information about Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell; doesn't recall ever meeting him; and never flew on his plane or visited his home, office or island.

"Never had any connection or communication with him. I knew Ghislaine Maxwell casually as an acquaintance but whatever they asked me I did my very best to respond," Clinton said.

#hillaryclinton #clinton #testimony #deposition #epstein #epsteinprobe #epsteinfiles #epsteininvestigation #ghislainemaxwell #billclinton #donaldtrump #presidenttrump #houseoversightcommittee

episodes.title: Department of Justice missing Epstein documents release deadlines
episodes.description:
The latest batch of documents related to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein were supposed to be released 25 days ago.  

President Donald Trump's former personal attorney and now Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, is citing necessary redactions and reviews for the holdup. 

Republicans and democrats are pressing the issue, earlier this month, congressman Thomas Massie says the missing deadlines are only part of the problem. 

  #montana #montanamoment #nbcmontana #mtwx #news #national #nationalnews #release #deadline #doj #department #of #justice #politicalnews #politics #epsteinfiles #epsteinlist #miss #missing #court

episodes.title: 'Doomsday Mom' Lori Vallow Daybell represents herself in new murder trial
episodes.description:
Lori Vallow Daybell, the Idaho woman infamously known as "The Doomsday Mom," was back in court Monday after she was sentenced to life in prison in 2023 for the murders of her two youngest children, 7-year-old J.J. Vallow and 16-year-old Tylee Ryan.

Aside from murder, Vallow Dayball was found guilty of plotting to kill her husband’s late wife, Tammy Daybell, as well as a charge of grand theft. 

#lorivallowtrial #lorivallowdaybell #daybell #daybelltrial
